contracts.name: LOVEToken
contracts.role: Soulbound ERC-20 with 50/50 sovereignty/performance pool split.
contracts.note: No external transfer — mint/burn only. Architects can abdicate to ZERO_ADDRESS.

contracts.name: ProofOfCare
contracts.role: Oracle contract computing care scores = sum(T_prox × Q_res) + tasks_verified.
contracts.note: Authorized relay pushes HRV telemetry. Decay: -0.005/day after 7d grace, floor 0.1.

contracts.name: LOVESBT
contracts.role: Soulbound token representing verified care relationships.

contracts.name: PayrollStream
contracts.role: Sablier-style closed-ended USDC streaming for operational payroll.
contracts.note: Cancelable. Unstreamed tokens return to sender. Van Camp compliance.

contracts.name: SlicingPieLedger
contracts.role: Deferred compensation tracker with GHRR and risk multipliers.
contracts.note: 2× for time, 4× for cash. Segregated from L.O.V.E. tokens.

contracts.name: TrancheWaterfall
contracts.role: Three-tier distribution: (1) OpEx+payroll, (2) PPT sweep, (3) PoC dividends.
contracts.note: Strict sequential waterfall. Tranche 1 must clear before Tranche 2/3.

contracts.name: PerpetualPurposeTrust
contracts.role: PPT vault holding DUNA/DAO ownership, GME shares, and USDC reserve.
contracts.note: Non-charitable, purpose-driven. No human beneficiaries. Van Camp shield.

contracts.name: P31TransparencyAnchor
contracts.note: digest in anchor() is operator-chosen bytes32 (typically sha256 of UTF-8 JSON).

contracts.name: P31ContentRoot
contracts.role: Owner-managed key → CID map for IPFS/Arweave hub snapshots.
contracts.note: Transfer owner to Safe multisig for production (see p31-sovereign-layers L10).

contracts.name: P31ManifestRegistry
contracts.role: SMART M — manifest id → latest digest + URI (permissionless publish).

contracts.name: P31AccessAllowlist
contracts.note: Use for gated hooks; rotate owner to multisig.

contracts.name: P31TreasuryConfig
contracts.role: SMART T — Safe + USDC + chain id; lock after configure.
contracts.note: Pairs with L8 on-chain payments in p31-sovereign-layers.json.

networks.name: base
networks.note: Production EVM anchor home (low fee, public explorers).
